name: Doorkeeper
description: Tokyo-based event-management SaaS for Japanese tech communities — REST API for events, tickets, members.

seo.title: Doorkeeper — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Doorkeeper: Tokyo-based event-management SaaS for Japanese tech communities — REST API for events, tickets, members.

when_to_use: Japanese tech event listing and RSVP management
REST API for aggregating Tokyo tech community events
Ticket issuance and member management for meetups
Community event feed for developer portal in Japan
Event attendance data sync to CRM for organizers

pros: Strong fit for ticketed Japanese tech community events
Member management and attendance tracking built in
REST API covers events, tickets, and members cleanly
Trusted by established Tokyo engineering communities
cons: Audience and feature set narrower than connpass
Documentation is Japanese-first with limited English
API feels dated compared to Eventbrite or Luma
Not suitable for non-Japanese event contexts
review.verdict: Specialized platform for Japanese tech communities; outside that niche you'll find better-documented global options.
review.best_for: Japanese tech meetup organizers needing tickets, members, and RSVPs in one tool.
review.not_for: Global event organizers or teams outside the Japanese community scene.
